mechanism: LNG supply growth shifts the energy leg of the commodity-rate interaction from a persistent directional drag on EUR to an episodic tail-risk amplifier. EUR-funded carry becomes safer on average but more dangerous in tails — the asymmetry standard vol measures understate.
regime_dependence: Transition is progressive through end-2027 as ~80 MTPA LNG capacity comes online; disruption events revert to crisis-mode level effects.
